name: Abstract Botanical — Warm Grey Taupe
palette: Warm grey, taupe, muted mauve on cream-white ground
bestFor: Living room, bedroom, hallway — contemporary warm interiors
keyStrength: Warm neutral palette matches walnut/travertine panels perfectly. Abstract botanical form is gender-neutral, season-neutral, trend-proof. Walnut frame ties directly to wood veneer assortment.
keyWeakness: May read too subtle for maximalist or heritage-leaning spaces

name: Misty Mountain Reflection — B&W Photography
style: Black & white landscape photography — mirrored mountain lake
palette: Greyscale — deep blacks, misty whites, full tonal range
bestFor: Living room feature, home office, bedroom — dramatic minimal interiors
bestSegments: Design Millennials · Aspirational Pro · Corporate / Commercial
keyStrength: High-contrast B&W creates instant drama on any wall. Black frame pairs with dark stone panels (Nero Marquina, charcoal). Mirrored symmetry composition adds sophistication. Works as standalone hero or gallery wall anchor.
keyWeakness: Cool/monochrome tone may clash with warm-only palettes. Not suited for pooja, heritage, or Tier-2 traditional spaces.
